subject: DASHBOARD FIX PLAN - 7 Phases with Checkpoints

phase_summary: Phase 1: Data integrity & document storage infrastructure (2 days)
Phase 2: Homepage data fixes - agents, input needed, stats (2 days)
Phase 3: Homepage design & task ranking table (2 days)
Phase 4: Categories page - stats, filters, project cards (2 days)
Phase 5: System page restructure - hierarchy, agent roster (3 days)
Phase 6: Resources page - unified upload, project/task folders (2 days)

safeguards.backups: Every phase - data.json backup before changes
safeguards.checkpoints: Caleb approval required between each phase

communication.after_each_phase: Report completion to Caleb with screenshots
communication.if_blocked: Document issue and ask Caleb for guidance

files_to_edit.index_html: Homepage - urgent queue, agent activity, input needed, stats, ranking table
files_to_edit.categories_html: Categories - 12 stats, filters, project cards, modal
files_to_edit.system_html: System - organizational hierarchy, agent roster, OpenClaw metrics
files_to_edit.data_json: Add agentActivityLog, taskRankings, update agent statuses

data.note: This is the COMPREHENSIVE plan Caleb reviewed page-by-page. File: DASHBOARD_FIX_PLAN.md has full details.
